title: 4 Data Hub User Management
body_text:
4	Data Hub User Management
4.1	Overview of Data Hub User Management
You can芒聙聶t assign users access to Data Hub via the CPS Admin or User Management applications. Central 1 manages all Data Hub users. Instead, submit a ServiceNow request as described in the following section. Central 1 will assign Data Hub access to the user芒聙聶s Client Centre user ID.
Before submitting the ServiceNow request, ensure that the individual requesting Data Hub access has a Client Centre ID. They can be setup as a Client Centre User or a User Management Security Officer (芒聙聹Security Officer芒聙聺). See the User Management Part for procedures on creating Client Centre users and Security Officers.
4.2	Requesting a Data Hub User
Use ServiceNow to request a new Data Hub user. The ServiceNow form is only available to Security Officers. They can request Data Hub access for themselves or for other users.
To request access to Data Hub:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 3: Select 芒聙聹ServiceNow芒聙聺
The ServiceNow main menu displays if you芒聙聶re successfully authenticated.
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select 芒聙聹Service Catalogue芒聙聺
Select
Central 1 Client Self Service
, then select
Data Hub Dashboard Access Request
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Select 芒聙聹Data Hub Dashboard Access Request芒聙聺
Complete the Data Hub Dashboard Access Request as follows. See Figure 6.
芒聭
Requesting on Behalf
芒聙聯 Check the 芒聙聹Requesting on Behalf?芒聙聺 box if submitting the request for another user. Don芒聙聶t check the box if submitting the request for yourself. By default, the box is unchecked and your Client Centre user ID and email are automatically prepopulated in the applicable fields below.
芒聭隆
User ID for Central 1 Client Centre
芒聙聯 Enter the user芒聙聶s Client Centre ID. This field is automatically populated if completing the request for yourself.
芒聭垄
Email Address
芒聙聯 Enter the user芒聙聶s email address. This field is automatically populated if completing the request for yourself.
芒聭拢
User芒聙聶s Department
芒聙聯 Use the drop-down menu to select the user芒聙聶s department. A default department is displayed.
芒聭陇
User芒聙聶s Job Role
芒聙聯 Enter the user芒聙聶s role in the company.
芒聭楼
User芒聙聶s Objectives
芒聙聯 Use the drop-down menu to select the objective for accessing Data Hub. A default reason is displayed.
芒聭娄
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 6: Complete the Data Hub Dashboard Access Request
4.3	Deleting a Data Hub User
To delete a Data Hub user:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 7.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 7: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
.
See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 9.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 9: Select 芒聙聹ServiceNow芒聙聺
The ServiceNow main menu displays if you芒聙聶re successfully authenticated.
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Select 芒聙聹Service Catalogue芒聙聺
Select
Central 1 Client Self Service
, then select
Make a Request
. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Select 芒聙聹Make a Request芒聙聺
Complete the Make a Request form as follows. See Figure 12.
芒聭
Requested For
芒聙聯 Optional. If you芒聙聶re creating the ticket on behalf of someone else, start typing their name then select it from the displayed list.
芒聭隆
External Client Reference Number
芒聙聯 Optional. If you have an internal reference number related to this request, enter it in this field.
芒聭垄
Short Description
芒聙聯 Enter a short description of the request.
芒聭拢
Detailed Description
芒聙聯 Enter a detailed description of the request including the name of the Data Hub user to be deleted and their Client Centre username.
芒聭陇
Do you wish to notify additional contacts?
芒聙聯
Optional. Select the checkbox if you want to notify other contacts about this request. Start typing their name, then select it from the displayed list.
芒聭楼
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 12: Complete the Make a Request Form
4.4	Dormant Users
If you don芒聙聶t log in to Data Hub for 180 days, you芒聙聶ll receive an email advising that access to the platform will be removed after another 60 days of inactivity. After 240 consecutive days of inactivity, your access to Data Hub will be removed. Central 1 will email you to advise of the removal.
END
